post.description: Handle group membership changes for snow.
Add an owner to a group.

get.description: Retrieve the owners of a group.
Retrieve the members of a group.

parameters.name: source

schema.description: Source environment(s) to query from: 'gcp' (Cloud Identity), 'azure' (Azure AD), 'both_union' (union of Azure AD + Cloud Identity), 'both_common' (intersection - only members present in both), 'gcp_only' (Cloud Identity members not in Azure AD), 'azure_only' (Azure AD members not in Cloud Identity). Defaults to 'gcp' for backward compatibility.

parameters.description: Source environment(s) to query from: 'gcp' (Cloud Identity), 'azure' (Azure AD), 'both_union' (union of Azure AD + Cloud Identity), 'both_common' (intersection - only members present in both), 'gcp_only' (Cloud Identity members not in Azure AD), 'azure_only' (Azure AD members not in Cloud Identity). Defaults to 'gcp' for backward compatibility.

post.description:
Sync group members from Azure AD to Cloud Identity.

Args:
    group_email: The email of the group to sync.
    dry_run: If true, only calculate diff without modifying Cloud Identity.
    input_model: Sync configuration (batch_size, safe_mode).

Returns:
    OutputSyncResultModel with sync results.

schema.description: If true, only calculate diff without modifying Cloud Identity
schema.title: Dry Run

info.title: BTDP Groups API
info.description: API to manage groups and users in BTDP.

tags.name: Configure group members
tags.description: This section of the API allows you to configure group members for a given group.

tags.name: Configure group owners
tags.description: This section of the API allows you to configure group owners for a given group.

tags.name: Configure groups
tags.description: This section of the API allows you to configure groups.

zone.title: IT Zone code
zone.description: The IT Zone code of the group

platforms.title: Create on platform
platforms.description: Specify where the group should be created: 'aad' for Entra ID and/or 'gcp' for Cloud Identity

self_sync.title: Self Sync
self_sync.description: Whether the service should handle the AzureAD-to-CloudIdentity synchronization itself. By default, or if False, group member synchronization is delegated to Azure. If True, the GroupsAPI service will handle the synchronization directly. Only set to True if the group is exclusively handled through GroupsAPI. This parameter only applies when platforms='both'.

request_uid.title: Request Uid
request_uid.description: A unique id identifying the request. If it was defined in environ when starting the response.
